tester.role: automated fontTools inspection with human result review

steps: Download the exact TTF from the pinned Google Fonts source commit.
Inspect name, version, OS/2 fsType, fvar axes, cmap, GSUB/GPOS feature tags, and required currency code points.
Compare advance widths of base digits zero through nine.
expected: File parses cleanly and exposes enough metadata to record identity, embedding flag, axes, binary coverage, features, currency glyphs, and numeral behaviour.
actual: Parsed as Atkinson Hyperlegible Next version 2.001. fsType was 0. Weight axis was 200–800. Latin and Latin-extension subsets are declared by the distribution; selected Latin and combining-mark checks passed, but the tested Vietnamese precomposed and dot-below characters were not both present. INR, USD, EUR, GBP, and JPY were present. Base digits were proportional; pnum and tnum features were present.

artifacts.description: Candidate metadata derived from this inspection

notes: Pass covers this binary inspection only. It does not validate Braille Institute legibility claims for a particular user, accessibility, complete language support, application behaviour, or production-file selection.
followUp: Run corpus tests, low-vision user review, static-file selection, and the platform matrix.
